creator: itetcu@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Tue, 17 Jun 2008 17:29:16 +0200
"Arjan van Leeuwen" <freebsd-maintainer@opera.com> wrote:
> This patch updates opera (www/opera) to version 9.5.

Thank you.

> It also tries to be as close as possible to Opera's original package
> without breaking the user experience.

Ummm,  I'm not opposed to the idea per se, but are you sure it a good
idea to remove all FreeBSD customization? (like search.ini, etc.)

BTW, what will it keep from custom settings (search, keyboard
shortcuts, etc.)?

-- 
IOnut - Un^d^dregistered ;) FreeBSD "user"
  "Intellectual Property" is   nowhere near as valuable   as "Intellect"
